classifications.actor: scoped loopback user, assistant confirmation front door, or authorized CLI
classifications.target_resources: provider registry, model registry/runtime target, encrypted secret namespace, bounded setup state
classifications.policy_path: Universal Mutation Plan -> durable scoped confirmation -> Capability Policy -> Executor Registry
classifications.executor: one registered capability-bound executor per domain operation
classifications.confirmation_requirements: actor/thread/session/capability/executor/target bound and durable single-use
classifications.rollback_scope: operation-specific receipt; secrets never journal old plaintext
classifications.audit_evidence: Audit v2D manual review and tests/test_provider_model_authorization.py
